name: Apple Nut Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
2. Add melted shortening (or drippings) and mix until well combined.
3. Stir in the beaten eggs, applesauce, and chopped nuts until just mixed.
4. Fill greased 2 1/2 inch muffin tins about 2/3 full with batter.
5. Bake in a moderate oven at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 to 25 minutes.
